cookieGuide.title: Cookie Retrieval Guide
cookieGuide.description: Step-by-step guide on how to find and copy the steamLoginSecure cookie from your web browser.

1.title: Log in to Steam on Browser
1.desc: Visit steamcommunity.com on your desktop browser and log in to your Steam account.
1.tip: Make sure you log in on a Web browser (Chrome, Edge, Safari...), not the Steam PC client.
1.textHint: Log in to your Steam account on the Web version so the browser creates a session Cookie.

2.title: Open Developer Tools (F12)
2.desc: Press the F12 key on your keyboard (or right-click the web page and select 'Inspect') to open the tools panel.
2.tip: The DevTools panel will appear at the bottom or on the right of your browser screen.

3.title: Navigate to Cookies list
3.desc: Select the 'Application' tab in the top menu, then expand the 'Cookies' item in the left list and click 'https://steamcommunity.com'.
3.tip: In Firefox or some browser versions, this tab might be named 'Storage'.
3.selectCookiesDesc: To expand the cookie list and locate steamLoginSecure

4.title: Copy steamLoginSecure
4.desc: In the displayed table, find the row with the Name column 'steamLoginSecure'. Double-click its corresponding Value cell and copy (Ctrl + C) the code.
4.tip: This cookie code is very long and starts with your SteamID. Never share this code with anyone.

cookieGuide.securityDesc: This cookie is only used to retrieve your public Steam items directory. The system does not store this code on our servers or share it with any third parties in any form.

inventoryScanner.title: Steam Inventory Scan & Valuation

apiErrors.geminiQuotaExceeded: Gemini quota exceeded for model {{model}}.{{retryText}} Please change GEMINI_MODEL/API key or enable billing to continue recognizing images.

apiErrors.invalidImageFormat: Inventory image must be PNG, JPG, or WebP.

apiErrors.errScanTimeout: Inventory scan took too long. Please try again.
apiErrors.scanTimeout: Inventory scan took too long. Please try again.
apiErrors.errLoginRequired: Login required. Please log in to scan.
apiErrors.retryRoundsLimit: Tried {{max}} times, {{count}} items still 0đ. Steam might not have prices for these items.
apiErrors.importDoneSaveResult: Saved {{count}} item types to personal portfolio.
apiErrors.importDoneSaveResultWithSkipped: Saved {{count}} item types to personal portfolio, skipped {{skipped}} unsupported items.
apiErrors.importErrorLoginRequired: Please log in via Google before saving inventory to your personal portfolio.
apiErrors.importErrorNoValidItems: No valid items to save to portfolio.
apiErrors.importErrorRowCaseNotFound: Row {{row}}: case not found. Please enter a valid Case ID or Market Hash Name.
apiErrors.importErrorRowMissingCaseIdOrName: Row {{row}}: missing Case ID or Market Hash Name.
apiErrors.importErrorNoValidRows: File does not contain valid portfolio rows.
apiErrors.steamRateLimitRetry: Steam is rate limiting requests. Retrying automatically in {{seconds}} seconds (attempt {{attempt}}/{{max}})...
apiErrors.accountCookieNotConfigured: This account has no cookie yet. Add steamLoginSecure to scan private inventories and Steam Market listings.
apiErrors.invalidCookieFormat: steamLoginSecure is not in a valid format. Copy the full steamLoginSecure cookie from Steam Community again and check that no characters are missing.
apiErrors.cookieInvalidFormat: steamLoginSecure is not in a valid format. Copy the full steamLoginSecure cookie from Steam Community again and check that no characters are missing.
apiErrors.cookieSteamIdMismatch: This cookie belongs to Steam account {{cookieSteamId}}, not the account you are configuring ({{steamId64}}). Sign in to the correct Steam account and get a new cookie.
apiErrors.cookieExpiredOrInvalid: The cookie has expired or Steam no longer accepts it. Sign in to Steam Community again and update the cookie.
apiErrors.cookieExpired: The cookie has expired or the Steam session was signed out. Sign in to Steam Community again and get a new cookie.
apiErrors.familyViewCookieRequired: This account has Family View enabled. Add steamparental and sessionid, or disable Family View on Steam, then scan again.
apiErrors.familyViewInvalidParentalCookie: This account has Family View enabled. steamparental/sessionid is missing or no longer valid; update the Family View configuration and scan again.
apiErrors.privateInventoryCookieRequired: Cannot read the inventory with the current cookie. If Inventory is Private, update the valid steamLoginSecure cookie for the correct account to keep it private and still scan it; or open Steam > Edit Profile > Privacy Settings, set Inventory to Public, and scan again.
apiErrors.privateInventoryNoCookie: This account's Inventory is Private and no cookie is configured. Add a valid steamLoginSecure cookie to scan without making it public, or open Steam > Edit Profile > Privacy Settings, set Inventory to Public, and scan again.
apiErrors.privateInventoryOrNotFound: Cannot read the inventory. The account may not exist or Inventory may be Private. If this is the correct account, set Inventory to Public or add a valid steamLoginSecure cookie to scan the private inventory.
apiErrors.emptyOrPrivateInventory: No inventory items were found. If the account has items, Inventory may be Private: set Inventory to Public or add a valid steamLoginSecure cookie, then scan again.
apiErrors.steamHttpError: Steam returned HTTP {{status}} while reading the inventory. This is a Steam response error; try scanning again in a few minutes.
apiErrors.steamRateLimited: Steam is temporarily rate limiting the application's server. Your Inventory may still be Public; this error is unrelated to cookies or privacy settings. The app retried automatically, but Steam still returned HTTP 429. Wait a few minutes and scan again.
apiErrors.failedToInspectFromCSFloat: Failed to inspect pattern from CSFloat (Rate limits/Bots blocked).
apiErrors.paintSeedNotFound: Paint Seed (Pattern Index) not found for this skin.
apiErrors.csfloatRateLimited: Public CSFloat API is rate-limited or requires an API Key. Please configure CSFLOAT_API_KEY in your .env.
apiErrors.cannotDecodeInspectLink: Unable to decode inspect link offline, and CSFloat API is not configured or failed.
